signals.headline: UK GDP Growth Confirmed Unrevised at 0
signals.raw:
UK GDP Growth Confirmed Unrevised at 0.1% QoQ and 1% YoY in Q4 2025 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The UK economy expanded by 0.1% quarter-on-quarter in Q4 2025 (October-December), matching preliminary estimates and the prior quarter's pace, with production up 1.2% led by manufacturing; year-on-year growth was 1%, the slowest since Q1 2024.[4]
